prompt:
Goal: Create a monochrome-and-red Japanese character reference sheet for CHRONOWA, a cute cool black cat mascot who listens to night sounds, wearing white sunglasses and red headphones.

Canvas: Vertical A4 poster / character sheet, off-white paper background with thin black border, red corner accents, small halftone dots, barcode, waveform graphics, tiny city skyline silhouettes, and a red crescent moon. Palette is strict: black, white, gray, and vivid red only. Style is clean vector mascot design mixed with Japanese graphic-design infographic aesthetics.

Top header: Large Japanese title 「クロノワ」 followed by “/ CHRONOWA”. Subtitle underneath: 「夜の音を聴く黒猫」 with a small red audio waveform line. Add a black city skyline at the top right under a red crescent moon.

Main subject: Center the largest full-body front view of the black cat, sitting upright with a curled tail, large pointed ears, thin whiskers, oversized white sunglasses with black lenses and white highlights, and red-and-black headphones resting around the neck. Label this central view 「正面」.

Left column poses: Include exactly 3 smaller pose panels with black label tabs: 1) 「側面」 side view, sitting profile, wearing white sunglasses and red headphones around the neck; 2) 「リスニング」 listening pose, headphones worn over the ears, paws touching headphones, small music note; 3) 「リラックス」 relaxed lying pose, sunglasses on, headphones around neck.

Right column item and mood panels: Include an item box labeled 「アイテム」 with exactly 2 items: 1) white sunglasses labeled 「白いサングラス」, 2) red headphones labeled 「赤いヘッドホン」. Below it, include a mood icon box labeled 「表情・ムードアイコン」 with exactly 6 small black cat icons in a 2-column by 3-row grid, each wearing sunglasses: 1) 「ごきげん」 with music note and raised tail, 2) 「気まぐれ」 sitting with subtle motion marks, 3) 「照れ」 shy blushing / embarrassed pose, 4) 「警戒」 alert pose with motion marks, 5) 「やさしい」 gentle pose with a small red heart, 6) 「生意気」 cocky/annoyed pose with red anger mark.

Bottom information grid: Create exactly 8 bordered information cards with black angled headers and red section numbers. Card 01 「プロフィール」 lists: 種族：黒猫, 性別：不詳, 年齢：不明, 一人称：ボク, 住処：夜の街. Card 02 「性格」 lists exactly 5 bullet points: クール, 気まぐれ, 照れ屋, 実はやさしい, 少し生意気. Card 03 「特徴」 lists exactly 4 bullet points: 白いサングラス, 赤いヘッドホン, 音の色が見える, 街の感情を聴ける. Card 04 「好きなもの」 lists exactly 4 lines: 夜の街 / 音楽 / 屋上 / 赤いもの / 雨上がりの道路, plus a red hand-drawn heart. Card 05 「苦手なもの」 lists exactly 3 lines: 強い日差し / 大きすぎる音 / しつこい相手, with a red sun warning icon. Card 06 「能力」 lists exactly 4 bullet points: 音を聴き分ける, 夜道に詳しい, 気配を消すのが得意, 小さな幸運を運ぶ, plus a tiny cat silhouette and red star. Card 07 「設定」 contains a compact Japanese backstory about red headphones collecting memories and emotions of the city at night, and how the cat sees sound colors through white sunglasses. Card 08 「セリフ」 contains exactly 4 quotes: 「今夜の音、悪くないね」, 「昼は苦手。」, 「世界が明るすぎる」, 「いい夜だね。少しだけ、歩こうか」, with a red paw print.

Footer: Add a barcode at bottom left, the word “CHRONOWA”, a red handwritten “meow”, a small black skyline silhouette along the bottom, and “LISTEN TO THE NIGHT.” at the bottom right.

Visual style: Sharp flat vector shapes, slightly imperfect printed zine texture, clean Japanese UI label tabs, thin technical lines, red accents on tabs and icons, high contrast silhouette cat. Keep text legible, preserve all Japanese labels exactly, and do not add extra characters or extra panels.
